title: Toronto Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Toronto with a Z-Score of -3.00. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Toronto are characterized by a high level of humidity at 82% and moderate winds at 10.5 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.5 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a significant need for heating. 
 The cold snap is expected to have a significant impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Monitoring and mitigation strategies should be implemented immediately to address the critical cold snap in Toronto.
